name: EmailAccessIssues
description: Customer cannot access their legacy Virgin Media email account — including ntlworld.com, blueyonder.com, or virginmedia.com email addresses. They may be locked out, unable to sign in, or experiencing service disruption with their legacy email. This is specifically about legacy email services, not about the MyVM account login or general email address changes.

My {legacyEmailDomain} email has stopped working

I've been locked out of my {legacyEmailDomain} email
I can't sign in to my {legacyEmailDomain} email address
